degraded: complexity classifier first returned estimate='large' + risk_flag touches_migrations from message-prose keywords (the verbose plan message trips the scope-keyword estimate; nothing in the diff touches SQL/migrations). A neutral, diff-accurate re-run returned 'medium' (history prior n=20, scope_keyword_estimate=trivial, zero risk flags). Overridden to medium per feedback_classifier_message_keyword_falsepos.md; the medium+ review path (3.5/3.7/3.8) was run regardless; F11 recomputes from diff-predicates. Real flags: cross_component + touches_io_boundary.

surface_verification.runner: pytest (plugins/shipwright-compliance 1119 + shared traceability/layer 68) + live generate_file() config-boundary probes + group_d/layer_coverage gate suites
surface_verification.justification: No runnable app surface (web/cli/api) is added or changed — this is a compliance-collector scan-scope config knob. The behavior is proven by the F0 suite (1119 compliance + 68 shared traceability/layer, all green), two @pytest.mark.integration round-trips through generate_file(), and 11 empirical config-boundary probes (BOM/CRLF/non-object/absolute/**/escape + real-monorepo regen). The collector + Group-D detectors it drives are exercised end-to-end by the TT1-TT7 suites.

behaviors.behavior: AC1 — a @FR-tagged test under a config-opted plugins/*/tests root round-trips into the regenerated on-disk manifest (the tag PERSISTS instead of write-then-drop)
behaviors.evidence: test_test_links_config_roots.py::test_plugin_dir_tagged_test_round_trips_and_fixtures_are_fenced PASSED — generate_file() writes the manifest, schema-validates, and FR-07.01 carries the plugins/demo/tests/test_widget.py link

behaviors.behavior: AC4 — the collector's own traceability fixture mini-repos (fake @FR tags) are fenced by traceability.exclude_dirs so scanning plugins/*/tests fans NO bogus orphan; the exclude is load-bearing
behaviors.evidence: test_plugin_dir_tagged_test_round_trips_and_fixtures_are_fenced (orphans==[]) + test_without_exclude_the_fixture_tag_would_orphan (FR-99.99 confirmed_orphan appears WITHOUT the exclude) — both PASSED

behaviors.behavior: AC2 — config ABSENT ⇒ default scan is byte-unchanged (frozen golden + collector goldens reproduce exactly)
AC3 — traversal rewritten rglob→os.walk+in-place dirnames prune: vendored subtrees never descended, overlapping roots yield each file once, deterministic order
behaviors.evidence: test_overlapping_roots_yield_each_file_once PASSED; goldens (order-sensitive) reproduce; dirnames sorted in-place

behaviors.behavior: AC5 — describe/it suite propagation gated to TS/JS so a describe/it inside a PYTHON string literal (collector self-tests) is not a phantom suite tag
behaviors.evidence: test_describe_it_inside_a_python_string_is_not_a_suite_tag PASSED; real-monorepo regen: 5 phantom orphans BEFORE the gate → 0 AFTER

behaviors.behavior: AC6 — malformed config robustness: non-object JSON root, absolute test_roots entry, `**` glob, garbled/BOM JSON, and ../ escape are all dropped/fenced (never crash the regen), fallback is observable via stderr
AC7 — the real monorepo manifest regenerates clean with the opt-in (15 reqs, 0 orphans, 0 invalid, schema-valid; untagged 158→7014 = the honest backfill surface)
behaviors.evidence: live generate_file(project_root) probe: reqs=15 orphans=0 invalid=0 untagged=7014; group_d D-orphan/D-layer + layer_coverage TT5 suites PASSED against the output
